title: Building AI That Builds Itself - Ep. 35 with Yohei Nakajima
title_zh: 构建自我构建的人工智能-与Yohei Nakajima一起第35集
full_text: Yohei Nakajima leads a double life. By day, he’s a general partner of a small venture firm, Untapped Capital. By night, he’s one of the most prolific internet tinkerers in AI. (He also sometimes works on automating his job as a venture capitalist.) He’s the creator of BabyAGI (@babyAGI_), the first open-source autonomous agent that went viral in March 2023. Yohei has since released seven iterations of BabyAGI (each one named after a different animal), a coding agent called Ditto, a framework f
